description: Validate planner-emitted tool calls and full plans against policy. Rules: tool must be registered, tool must be enabled, mutation tools require confirmation, fast-mode eligibility comes from the manifest (`supports_fast_mode`), email-send is forbidden, cloud / package mutations are forbidden in `/x`.
notes: Mutation pause (tr-08) and confirmation UX (saf-08) are downstream from this; this task only decides allowed / not-allowed.
steps: TDD: Plan calling unregistered tool fails.
TDD: Plan calling disabled tool fails.
TDD: Plan with email-send step fails.
TDD: Plan with email-mark step requires confirmation.
TDD: `/x` plan with cloud-mutation step fails.
TDD: `/x` plan with package-install step fails.
name: [tr-04] Tool-call and agent-plan policy
